overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a character exploring a cozy rustic cottage with stone and timber construction, thatched roofing, and warm interior lighting. The character enters from outside, walks through a torch-lit corridor, explores a main living area with bookshelves and kitchen, ascends to an attic bedroom, then returns downstairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: entry corridor with stone walls and torch lighting

events.description: character enters the cottage from bright outdoor daylight into dim interior
lighting shifts from bright natural daylight to warm artificial torchlight

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow stone corridor just inside the entrance, passing wall-mounted torches

entered.detail: rough-hewn stone door frame marking the cottage entrance
medieval-style wall-mounted torch providing warm flickering light
dark wooden door left open behind the character
yellow and red containers stacked against the stone wall
stone steps leading downward visible in the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character enters a rustic cottage from outside, moving through a narrow stone-walled corridor illuminated by warm wall-mounted torches. The space is enclosed with wooden ceiling beams and storage containers visible along the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: main living area with library and kitchenette

events.description: exits narrow corridor into open main living space with high ceilings
interior brightens with natural light streaming through windows

agents.ego_description: walking through the main living area, examining the bookshelves, wicker furniture, and kitchen area with woven baskets

entered.detail: large wooden bookshelf filled with books against the left wall
woven wicker chair with cushion near the center of the room
ornate red and beige patterned rug covering the wooden floor
black cast iron wood-burning stove with metal pipe chimney
wooden shelving unit with kitchenware and baskets

segments.scene_description: The character enters a spacious main living area with mixed natural and artificial lighting. The room features a tall bookshelf, wicker furniture, a cast iron stove, and a kitchen area with open shelving. The thatched roof is visible through upper windows as the character explores the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden staircase connecting ground floor to attic

events.description: character begins ascending the wooden staircase to the upper floor

agents.ego_description: walking toward and climbing the wooden staircase, passing a wall mirror and coat rack

entered.detail: steep wooden staircase with thick beams and railings
ornate gold-framed mirror reflecting the character
wooden stand holding cloaks and garments
large ornate ceramic urn on a wooden table

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the main living area toward a wooden staircase. The space narrows as they approach the stairs, passing a gold-framed mirror and coat rack. The character then ascends the steep wooden stairs toward a round attic window.

scene_state.functional_zone: attic bedroom with sloped thatched roof and dormer windows

events.description: enters the attic bedroom from the stairwell
bright natural sunlight streams through dormer windows illuminating the space

agents.ego_description: exploring the attic bedroom, examining the bed, dresser with mirror, and looking out the dormer windows

entered.detail: simple wooden bed frame with white linens under the sloped roof
light wood dresser with drawers and candles on top
oval wall mirror with decorative frame above the dresser
window with blue curtains set into the sloped thatched roof
exposed thatch roofing material forming the angled walls

segments.scene_description: The character enters a bright attic bedroom with sloped thatched walls and dormer windows. The room contains a wooden bed, dresser with an oval mirror, and a writing desk. Warm natural light fills the space as the character looks around the cozy upper room.

scene_state.functional_zone: descending staircase and ground floor corridor

events.description: character turns and begins descending the staircase back to the ground floor
returns to the lower floor corridor near the entrance

agents.ego_description: walking down the wooden stairs and returning to the ground floor corridor

entered.detail: same wooden staircase now viewed from above while descending
ground floor hallway with rugs and wall decorations

segments.scene_description: The character descends the wooden staircase from the attic, leaving the bedroom behind. They return to the ground floor corridor, passing the coat rack and wall mirror once more as they approach the exit area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a dim, enclosed entryway into a bright, airy attic before returning to the cottage's rustic ground floor. It begins by moving through a narrow stone-walled corridor illuminated by warm wall-mounted torches and wooden ceiling beams. As the space opens up, the camera enters a spacious main living area filled with wicker furniture and a cast iron stove, eventually narrowing again as it passes a gold-framed mirror toward a steep wooden staircase. The scene then ascends into a bright attic bedroom where warm natural light fills the room through dormer windows and sloped thatched walls. Finally, the camera descends the stairs and retraces its path past the coat rack and mirror, returning to the initial ground floor corridor toward the exit.
